content: Content entropy: Shannon entropy H = -sum(p*log2 p) over characters or n-grams. LOW entropy => templated/repetitive text. HIGH per-char entropy with low dictionary-word ratio => random gibberish (algorithmically generated handles/spam). Char n-gram (bigram/trigram) entropy + a compression-ratio proxy (e.g. gzip/zstd length vs raw) cheaply separate natural language from templated or random text. O(len) per doc, trivially fast. False positives: short posts, code, non-Latin scripts skew entropy; normalize by length and script. Tunable: entropy floor/ceiling, dictionary-word ratio threshold.
